name: n8n-mcp-synta-codex
description: Build and edit n8n workflows from Codex via Synta MCP

interface.shortDescription: Build n8n workflows from Codex via Synta MCP
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that connects to Synta MCP so you can create, edit, validate, and self-heal n8n workflows from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Build an n8n workflow with Synta MCP.
Fix this n8n workflow using Synta MCP.
Validate and repair my n8n automation.
